It was suppose to be an easy bet for 100 dollars. Win your heart, be "kind" and "sweet" to you for a couple of months before dumping you publicly on valentines day.

It was easy asking you out.. Cause, nobody liked you to be honest. You were the campus' weirdo, always getting made fun of and getting bad talk behind your back. And how easy you said yes when Axel asked you out.

during those months.. Axel started feeling.. A weird feeling in his chest. Was he.. Growing feelings for you? No no no. He doesnt do dating! Hes not into that yucky shit. But.. Day by day everytime he hung out with you... He felt weird.

Until two days before valentines, you overheard his conversation with his friends. Uh oh.
